task_completion.description: Verify the 'T1 Head' sample image is loaded in Fiji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji window displaying an image titled 'T1 Head' (or 't1-head.tif') with a scrollbar at the bottom indicating 129 slices (e.g., '1/129').

task_completion.description: Verify a Maximum Intensity Projection is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window titled 'MAX_T1 Head' (or similar) showing a single 2D image without a slice slider, or the 'ZProject' dialog box visible with 'Max Intensity' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify contrast adjustment is performed on the projection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'B&C' (Brightness/Contrast) window is open and sliders have been moved from their default positions, or the projection image visually appears enhanced/adjusted.

task_completion.description: Verify the projection is saved as a PNG to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'max_projection.png' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

task_completion.description: Verify image statistics are measured for the projection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fiji 'Results' window is open, displaying a table with statistics (like Area, Mean, Min, Max) for the 'MAX_T1 Head' image.

task_completion.description: Verify the statistics are exported to a CSV file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog for the Results table showing the filename 'projection_stats.csv' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Fiji GUI to process the image rather than bypassing it with terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Fiji menus being navigated (e.g., Image > Stacks > Z Project, Analyze > Measure) and Fiji dialog boxes being used.

integrity.description: Verify the statistics CSV was generated by Fiji and not manually typed or mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Results' window in Fiji should contain actual computed numbers that match the exported CSV, rather than the agent using a text editor to create a fake CSV.

integrity.description: Verify the actual 'T1 Head' sample was used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image shown in Fiji should visually resemble a human head MRI scan (256x256 dimensions), not a random placeholder image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'T1 Head' sample is a 256x256x129 voxel, 16-bit grayscale MRI scan (not a CT scan). The resulting Maximum Intensity Projection must be a single 256x256 2D image slice. Look for the title 'MAX_T1 Head' or similar for the projected image window.
